geographic_restrictions: Philadelphia, Bucks, Chester, Delaware, and Montgomery counties in Pennsylvania
project_area: Business formation or development in creative industries (e.g., marketing, architecture, visual arts, crafts, design, film and media, digital games, music, entertainment, publishing)
demographic_requirements: Applicants must be at least 18 years old, current Pennsylvania residents for at least one year, and demonstrate gross revenue of less than $200,000 from their creative entrepreneur business. Non-profit organizations are not eligible.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants are creative entrepreneurs (individuals or for-profit micro businesses) in specified creative fields with gross revenue under $200,000, residing in designated Pennsylvania counties. Applicants must not have received CEA funding in the past three years and must complete a mandatory referral meeting with a small business development organization. Non-profits are excluded.
